title.en: Even if he really killed him, would Ye Tian be ...

content.en:
"You're crazy!"

Blood Peng was speechless, he fled to the rear of the Supreme Dao Void Demon Army, and Ye Tian followed to kill.

Even if he really killed him, would Ye Tian be able to escape?

Is it worth it?

"Blood Peng, we're coming!"

Three more Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons rushed to the rescue of Blood Peng.

These three are not ordinary Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, they are also all powerhouses on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List, but they are only ranked relatively low.

"Hahaha, Blood Linzi, Blood Spider, War Tiger, thank you for coming to support!"

Xuepeng felt that Ye Tian must find a way to escape at this time.

However, Ye Tian ignored these three Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons and still attacked him.

Bang!!!!

The three Supreme Dao Void Demons such as the Blood Linzi killed Ye Tian, but Ye Tian only attacked the Blood Peng, obviously to sacrifice this copy body and kill the Blood Peng.

Gradually, Ye Tian's injuries became more and more serious, but Xuepeng was also on the verge of death.

At last.

Ye Tian burned everything and launched the final blow.

Under this blow, the blood linzi retreated, not daring to take it hard, let alone block it for the blood peng.

Their strength is already much weaker than that of Blood Peng, even if they don't die, but once they are hit hard, they will still be in danger of their lives on such a battlefield!

Burst!

Blood Peng's body was pierced, and the power of the Seventh Sequence of Perfection Supreme Dao Rules wiped out his last vitality.

So far.

Blood Peng fell, and the battle exploits fell on Ye Tian's battlefield order.

And Ye Tian also directly lifted this copy body, after all, it was about to collapse, and he couldn't withstand the wave of attacks from the Blood Linzi.

At this time.

The blood linzi was stunned, a demon who walked the strongest way, and died like this???

Just to kill the blood peng, is it worth it?

Such a demon, not to mention, will definitely be able to grow to the sevenfold supreme realm, but it will be 100% able to become the sixth-fold supreme realm!

Once you reach the Sixth Rank Dao Realm, your combat power is comparable to the top Eightfold Peak Dao Realm, so why die for the sake of a mere Blood Peng!

"It is estimated that Xuepeng killed his relatives or heirs, so he went crazy!"

Blood Linzi guessed.

"That's the only possibility!" Zhan Hu nodded, agreeing with this statement.

......

Heavenly Blood City III.

A mansion.

Ye Tian's other true body copied the body, took out the battlefield order, and smiled when he saw that there were three million more combat merits on it.

Some of them came from killing a large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons and some Sixfold Supreme Void Demons, and the other two million came from Blood Peng.

In addition to the three million war exploits, there is also the gift of the origin of heaven and earth!

It can be said that this wave of big profits!

"The war is not over yet, if you condense a copy body in the past, even if it is exposed, it doesn't matter if they let them know that I have a clone! Anyway, they can't kill me!" Ye Tian muttered.

Swish!

After Ye Tian's true body copy body was condensed, he continued to rush to Long Zehai.

Soon, he descended on Long Zehai again, and then slaughtered a group of Supreme Dao Void Demons, only then was he targeted by the powerful Supreme Dao Void Demon.

After killing several Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, a powerhouse on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List came to kill him.

"It's you!"

When Xuelinzi saw Ye Tian, he was stunned.

Before, Xuepeng and Ye Tian died together, he could see it clearly, why Ye Tian appeared again, and he was not injured at all.

"Clone !!!"

He was stunned, the one who killed Blood Peng before turned out to be a clone of the Supreme Dao Realm, but the doppelganger was difficult to refine, even among the Supreme Dao Void Demons, it was extremely rare for the Supreme Dao Void Demon to have a clone.

And the clone that has been refined is also relatively easy to see, but Ye Tian's clone is not like a clone at all, which clone has such combat power.

Even if it is a strong person who takes the path of the strongest to the Dao, the clone is just an ordinary supreme realm of the Dao, and it is impossible to have a foundation like the ontology, unless it is a doppelganger who can cultivate, cultivate from the beginning and re-walk the path of the Dao to the Dao, then the price paid will be great.

No one is willing to sacrifice a clone refined at such a high cost!

"Run!"

Blood Linzi didn't dare to fight Ye Tian, this guy was a madman.

The Blood Peng is dead, and he doesn't think that his strength is stronger than the Blood Peng.

Ye Tian didn't chase and kill the Blood Linzi, there was no strong man to stop him, he could kill more ordinary Dao Void Demons.

But soon, other Supreme Void Demons joined forces to besiege him.

However, Ye Tian's strength was too strong, absolutely comparable to the combat power of the top twenty in the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List, these Supreme Dao Void Demons were not his opponents at all, and they were killed by him one by one.

Ultimately.

The Dao Void Demon Battle River arrived, and the strength of the Battle River was weaker than that of Blood Chaos, but it was also ranked sixteenth on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List.

"Look for death!"

Zhan He directly killed Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's speed was not as good as Zhan He, and he had no way to get rid of him, so he had to fight with him.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian is a little weaker, but not much weaker, and he can fight with Zhan He.

If he tried his best, he would be able to suppress Zhanhe, but if he couldn't kill Zhanhe, there was no point in fighting.

After a long time, those Supreme Dao Void Demons began to retreat.

Before leaving, Zhan He dropped cruel words: "I will kill you next time!"

"Next time, I'll kill you!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Soon.

The other Dao realms also left Long Zehai one by one.

......

Heavenly Blood City III.

Ye Tian took out the Heavenly Blood Dragon Crystal Ore in the mansion.

"This is the Heavenly Blood Dragon Crystal, something that the Supreme Dao Void Demon desperately wants?"

The Heavenly Blood Palace also purchased the Heavenly Blood Dragon Crystal, and a Heavenly Blood Dragon Crystal ore was worth five thousand battle merits, which was very exaggerated.

Like this time, in order to snatch the Heavenly Blood Dragon Crystal, the Supreme Dao Void Demon fell a large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons, just for those few Heavenly Blood Dragon Crystals.

Ye Tian killed some Supreme Dao Void Demons and snatched about three hundred Heavenly Blood Dragon Crystals from them, which was not a lot, but it was also worth more than a million battle merits.

He only left one Heavenly Blood Dragon Crystal, and all the others were converted into battle merits, plus the battle merits he had gained from killing Blood Peng and other Supreme Dao Void Demons this time, he already had millions of battle merits on his body.

He replaced it all with Heavenly Blood True Liquid.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian refined the Heavenly Blood True Liquid, and then went to kill a group of Supreme Dao Void Demons.

In this way, the long years passed slowly.

And Ye Tian's ranking on the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List is getting higher and higher, and he has already reached the top twenty of the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List.

After all, other powerhouses didn't dare to slaughter the Supreme Dao Void Demon like him, it was too easy to fall, but Ye Tian was not worried about falling, so he was able to rank so high in a short period of time.

Before you know it, the years of the 100th Solstice Era have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's reputation was resounding throughout the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, and the Supreme Dao Void Demon also knew his intelligence, and even launched many assassinations against him, but he only killed his copy body, and he couldn't help him at all.

Therefore, Ye Tian was the Supreme Dao Realm that gave the Supreme Dao Void Demon the most headache.

And Ye Tian exchanged a large amount of Heavenly Blood True Liquid, and his cultivation gradually approached the realm of the late stage of the Quadruple Dao Realm.

Moreover, he had not yet refined the Heaven and Earth Origin Gift, and once he used it, he would inevitably break through to the late stage of the Fourfold Dao Realm.

However, he was going to save it more, and when the time came, he might be able to break through to the peak realm of the Fourfold Dao Realm in one go.
